R.description: Universal Resonance Constant. Ratio of lambda_min(L_8x8) / lambda_min(L_6x6). Unique to the star-cluster + 3-clause bridge topology.

L1_identity.description: Hodge 1-Laplacian Identity for Complete Graphs Kn. Establishes the dissipation floor for bridge-mediated flows.

cross_helicity_barrier.efficiency_decay: C_cross(N) decreases (0.4182 to 0.4069 across N=32 to N=64)

lamb_helicity_decomposition.bt_surgery_effect: BT surgery UNIVERSALLY increases cross-helical P_sol contribution (TG: 58%->100%, Imb: 48%->63%, Rnd: 53%->70%)
lamb_helicity_decomposition.claim3_strong_form: REFUTED for chiral/imbalanced flows under full NS (co-helical contributes 42-58%)
lamb_helicity_decomposition.claim3_achiral: EXACT at t=0 (machine epsilon). Drifts under full NS but stays 100% under BT surgery.
lamb_helicity_decomposition.helicity_bound_status: CORRECT when normalizations are consistent (66x was normalization bug, not formula error)
lamb_helicity_decomposition.data_files_verified: lamb_helicity_results.json DELETED (orphan, no generating script). lamb_decomposition_results.json is the verified output.
lamb_helicity_decomposition.status: OBSERVED (Numerical, S92 — verified by Meridian 2, full audit complete)

energy_weighted_leray_suppression.verdict: Energy weighting REDUCES alpha below geometric average. Near-antiparallel triads are energetically disfavored by the cascade. Geometric bound is CONSERVATIVE.

theoretical_kernel.beltrami_relation: Beltrami flows in ker(N_C). Nonlinear decoupling limit, NOT eigenstates of loop Hamiltonian.
theoretical_kernel.lyapunov_test: F(t) = ||P_sol(omega x v)||^2 / ||omega x v||^2 is NOT monotone. Full NS: F increases. BT surgery: F decreases on average.
theoretical_kernel.regulatory_constraint: Helicity conservation (Waleffe 1992) constrains heterochiral coupling budget.

path1_generalization.key_finding: R is geometry-specific; bridge width 1-2 degenerate
path1_generalization.result: POSITIVE — exact algebraic invariant family established

path2_random_sat.key_finding: No special behavior at alpha=4.267 (critical threshold)

path3_hodge_navier_stokes.key_finding: Valve = topological regularization; dual vertex-weakening / flow-strengthening
path3_hodge_navier_stokes.result: QUALITATIVE — analogy established, not quantitative bridge

proven_theorems: Thm 2.1: Grounded Laplacian as Schur Complement
Thm 3.1: Irreducibility of P_7 over Q
Thm 3.2: Irreducibility of P_5 over Q
Thm 8.2: Dual Effect of Valve Removal

leray_suppression_formula.exact_formula: alpha_{+-}(theta, rho) = 1 - (1+rho)^2(1+cos theta) / [(1+rho^2+2rho cos theta)(3-cos theta)]

properties.rho_minimum: isotropic avg MINIMIZED at rho=1 (1-ln2=0.307), INCREASES to 2(1-ln2)=0.614 as rho->0 or inf
properties.CORRECTION_S94: property (d) 'alpha->0 as rho->0 or inf' is FALSE. Scale separation WEAKENS suppression.

lamb_weighted_rho1.vanishing_at_extremes: F(theta) -> 0 at theta=0 AND theta=pi for ALL rho

open_problems.P1: Phase coherence control — multiple triads at same k3 can constructively interfere, pushing effective alpha_E above per-triad bound. THIS is the regularity problem.
open_problems.P2: C-S exponent — alpha<1 reduces constant but not 3/2 exponent in enstrophy bound
open_problems.P3: Extension of Migdal's No Explosion Theorem to deterministic ICs
